summary: Tested Location Setting & Session Navigation features. Found and fixed a bug where Feed.js used 'highlight=' instead of 'session=' parameter. Also fixed Bookings.js to read 'tab' URL parameter. All features now working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Feed.js used 'highlight=' instead of 'session=' parameter - FIXED
Bookings.js did not read 'tab' URL parameter - FIXED

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/Bookings.js - Added useSearchParams to read 'tab' URL parameter
seed_data_creation: Created test photographer with ID 00ec4c54-1dbe-4d29-b225-b954fb607bcc and set subscription to basic
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session navigation now works correctly. Feed.js navigates to /bookings?tab=scheduled&session={id} and Bookings.js reads the tab parameter to show the correct tab. ScheduledTab auto-scrolls to and highlights the session with cyan ring.

ScheduledTab_auto_scroll_highlight.details: Session is highlighted with ring-2 ring-cyan-400 and auto-scrolls into view

Photographer_Home_Location_GPS.details: Use GPS button available in Edit Rates modal

Photographer_City_Search.details: City/place search using Nominatim geocoding works - tested with 'San Diego, CA'

Location_Name_Display.details: Location name displayed as 'San Diego, San Diego County' with coordinates

Location_Warning.details: Warning shown: 'Set your location so surfers can see if you're in their area and calculate travel fees'
